    Withdrawing profits from transactions carried out by your wallet on the network (ETH)

    Enter the wallet you want to send your profits to, then agree to send your profits to it.

    Before You Copy

    Transaction Private Note

    Please DO NOT store any passwords or private keys here. A private note (up to 100 characters) can be saved and is useful for transaction tracking.
